note: Engine line coverage ratchet. Gated buckets may not drop more than maxDropPct below `measured`. Measured over the HONEST combined surface: the unit lcov UNIONed with the Phase C in-process harness lcov (scripts/merge-coverage.ts). See docs/HARDENING-9-PLAN.md H-02.
targetNote: target.lib=90 is the autonomous coverage campaign goal for the lib/ business-logic core. The gate measures the HONEST combined number: unit lcov UNIONed with the in-process harness lcov (scripts/merge-coverage.ts). Harness route suites (src/tests/harness/) plus focused unit tests climb toward 90%. External-service wiring (better-auth, S3, pg-boss, ioredis, Bun.SQL.subscribe, OTel SDK) + defensive catch-branches remain for integration/soak suites.
source: union of `bun test src/tests/unit --coverage` and `bun test src/tests/harness --coverage` lcovs via scripts/merge-coverage.ts (per-line DA hit union)
